title: Golden Age Act of 2025
plain_summary: The Golden Age Act of 2025 is a new law about changing money in America. Starting in 2028, all new one hundred dollar bills must have a picture of Donald J. Trump on the front instead of whoever is on them now. The person in charge of making money, called the Treasury Secretary, has to show everyone what the new bill will look like by 2026. This means people will see the new design two years before the new bills start being printed and used.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.

sections.title: Section 1. Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Golden Age Act of two thousand twenty-five.

sections.title: Section 2. Donald J. Trump on the One Hundred Dollar Note
sections.text: Starting after December thirty-first, two thousand twenty-eight, all new one hundred dollar bills must have a picture of Donald J. Trump on the front of the bill. This changes the existing law about how money is designed. The Secretary of Treasury (the person in charge of making money) must show the public what the new one hundred dollar bill will look like by December thirty-first, two thousand twenty-six. This early design must clearly show Donald J. Trump's picture on the front of the bill.
